parsed_review.summary: CP00-723 (RP24 Korean Legal Depth domain model + workflow slice head, RP24.P01.M02.S09-RP24.P01.M04.S06, risk B, 40 units) passes hardened read-only review. The pack-level production_ready claim is descriptor-only ("korean_legal_p01_domain_model_workflow_slice_descriptor_verified") and is fully supported: (1) registry.js CP723 binding/requirements and the manifest+baseline 40 included units exactly match the pack baseline (deliverable distribution impl 23 / ui 5 / fixture 2 / test 6 / hermes 2 / claude 2; micro-title 12/22/6; phase RP24.P01=40); (2) validators.js comprehensively enforces coverage (counts, distributions, section rows) and descriptor invariants (descriptor_only, no runtime opened, no sensitive/real payloads, permission/audit baselines closed, Hermes/Claude gate + handoff), and model.test.js asserts coverage.errors==[] and descriptor.errors==[] with all checks passing; (3) KOREAN_LEGAL_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION and per-row guards keep the pack synthetic-only/no-write, corroborated by command-evidence.json (writes_product_state:false, no_real_data:true) and 26 validation commands all exiting 0 (full closeout/spec/weighted/fullplan/goal/control-plane ladder + npm test + build + git diff --check); (4) authority boundary preserved — claude_is_final_approval:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false; (5) Hermes used only for descriptor evidence packets (emits_runtime_receipt:false, writes_product_state:false), not product runtime; (6) contract latest_pack=CP00-723 with CP00-722 retained as historical and validation.valid:true. The manifest, construction-inspection, adjudication, and claude-review-result all correctly hold production_ready:false / status pending_review awaiting exactly this hardened receipt rather than over-claiming. Auth preflight produced valid JSON (1455B, exit 0) — none of the forbidden review-evidence patterns (not_logged_in, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped, zero-byte, usage_limit) are present. Claude remains a read-only, non-final reviewer; the enterprise-trust/human-approval authority boundary is correctly external to this receipt and the pack makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim, so blocks_goal_closeout is false. The plan/queue governance files are conservatively classified as unrelated-preserved in changed-file-scope.json, which is expected non-blocking bookkeeping. No P0-P3 findings.
